markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore a partnership between GrowthX and HubSpot's solutions partner program.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [HubSpot is pushing partners to evolve from manual services to productized models, making GrowthX's AI-powered agency model a prime example.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [GrowthX’s internal platform and 50+ editors deliver high-volume (5 articles/wk), high-quality AEO content, targeting Series B+ clients with established ICPs.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Immediate partnership is blocked: GrowthX's service model doesn't fit the Solutions Partner Program's requirement to sell HubSpot licenses.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [A clear path emerged: co-market GrowthX's standalone platform (launching next month) to HubSpot's agency network, enabling them to resell AEO services.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)

## Topics

### HubSpot's Partner Strategy

  - [HubSpot's Solutions Partner Program is evolving beyond traditional agencies to include technical partners (e.g., CRM implementers).](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [**Strategic Push:** HubSpot is guiding partners to productize services to maintain margins as manual models (e.g., content/SEO) become unsustainable.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [**Referral Models:**](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2372.0)
      - [**Partner-Sourced:** Partner brings a deal to HubSpot and co-sells.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2384.0)
      - [**Partner-Assisted:** HubSpot direct reps refer clients to partners.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)

### GrowthX's Productized Service Model

  - [**Core Offering:** End-to-end AEO/SEO content creation, from strategy to publishing and LLM monitoring.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [**Delivery Model:**](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (8 wks):** Strategy sprint to develop client-specific "context engineering" (personas, brand voice).](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (12 mos):** Growth execution, delivering 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [**Internal Platform:** A proprietary platform automates workflows using APIs (e.g., SEMrush, SERP) and research tools (e.g., Exa, Tavli).](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [**Human-in-the-Loop:** 50+ in-house editors ensure quality and provide feedback to continuously improve platform workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [**Target Client:** Series B+ companies with established ICPs, seeking a volume play.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)
  - [**CMS Agnostic:** GrowthX publishes to any client CMS, with automated publishing capabilities that could be adapted for HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

### Partnership Opportunities & Blockers

  - [**Blocker:** GrowthX's service model doesn't fit the Solutions Partner Program, which requires partners to sell HubSpot licenses to tier up.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [**Opportunity 1: Co-Marketing GrowthX's Platform**](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)
      - [**Action:** Co-market GrowthX's standalone platform (launching next month) to HubSpot's agency network.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Enables HubSpot partners to resell AEO services without building their own tech.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2263.0)
  - [**Opportunity 2: HubSpot Marketplace App**](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
      - [**Action:** Build a technical integration for GrowthX's platform to publish directly to HubSpot's Content Hub.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
      - [**Benefit:** List GrowthX as an app in the HubSpot marketplace for direct purchase.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2037.0)
  - [**Opportunity 3: Agency Referral Program**](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [**Action:** HubSpot refers clients needing AEO services to GrowthX for a referral fee.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Provides a non-technical partnership path.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Send a recorded demo of the GrowthX internal platform to Justin.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
  - [**Justin:** Explore the viability of an agency referral program.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2113.0)
  - [**Bridget/Jenn:** Sync in early March to discuss partnership options, coordinating with the official announcement of HubSpot's investment in GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/sE7gjx6xtvt4QxHcDeWgV3xnE_yZvAhm?tab=summary&timestamp=2464.0)
